Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze the Request Input An event log from a financial support workflow with 3 cases C001 C002 C003 Problem Activity names are ambiguous Task Identify recurring activities and interpret their contextual differences Rename them to reflect context Present the revised event log Justify the naming choices

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Check C001 Verify Documents twice C002 Call Customer twice C003 Verify Documents twice

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Strict Interpretation I need to focus on activities that repeat within a specific Case ID

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Verify Documents first occurrence means initial check second occurrence means re verification after new information or correction

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Proposed Names Initial Document Verification versus Re Verification of Documents

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Call Customer first occurrence in C002 means clarification of discrepancy second occurrence means confirmation of completed adjustment

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Proposed Names Clarification Call versus Confirmation Call

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Adjust Account does not repeat within a case no need to rename based on the specific constraint

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Correction Initiate Request appears once per case so it does not fit the multiple times within a single case criteria

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Review against Constraints Did I identify recurring activities Yes Did I interpret meaning changes Yes Did I rename them Yes Did I present the revised log Yes Did I justify choices Yes

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final check C001 Verify Documents x2 C002 Call Customer x2 C003 Verify Documents x2
